summary: A detailed Product Requirements Document (PRD) for an advanced Edit PDF tool named 'ProPDF Editor'. The PRD covers vision, competitive analysis vs iLovePDF, 40+ features across 12 modules including AI-powered editing, real-time collaboration, advanced form builder, template marketplace, version history, accessibility tools, and more. Includes user personas, technical architecture, monetization strategy, success metrics, phased roadmap, and risk analysis.
